channel.title: Travel in Bavaria on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Travel in Bavaria on Share Hub

item.title: Ingolstadt Travel Guide | Danube City 1 Hour from Munich (2026)
item.description: Ingolstadt is known as Audi’s headquarters but its historic center is far richer. A city on the Danube River with medieval walls, the Bavarian Army Museum and an unexpected Frankenstein connection. 1 hour from Munich.

item.title: Salzburg Travel Guide | Mozart's City 1.5 Hours from Munich (2026)
item.description: Salzburg is a 1.5-hour train journey from Munich — Mozart’s birthplace and the city where Sound of Music was filmed. Deutschlandticket takes you to the border free — a few euros more and you’re in Austria.

item.title: Christmas and New Year in Germany | Munich Christmas Markets & Silvester (2026)
item.description: Christmas in Germany is very different from what you might expect. Weihnachten is quiet and family-focused; Silvester is surprisingly loud. From Munich’s Christmas markets to last year’s Silvester experience — German winter culture through expat eyes.

item.title: Deutschlandticket Day Trips from Munich | Bavaria with Kids (2026)
item.description: For 49 EUR per month you can take all local and regional trains across Germany. From Munich to Füssen, Garmisch, Salzburg, Starnberg Lake — routes we tested with two kids aged 1 and 5 and a double stroller.
